articles.title: Ripple CLO Demands Answers From SEC Over Hinman Speech Controversy
articles.description: Five years after Bill Hinman delivered his speech on cryptocurrencies, Chief Legal Officer (CLO) at Ripple, Stuart Alderoty, has called for an investigation into the former Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) official’s actions. The call comes after the SEC’s lawsuit against Ripple and the subsequent release of public emails and drafts of Hinman’s speech, which […]

articles.title: XRP pumps, Ripple’s CEO knocks SEC as Hinman’s statement goes public
articles.description: The Ripple-SEC case took an interesting turn. The document hidden from the public eye is now up for communal scrutiny.

articles.title: Ripple Does Not Care Whether XRP Is 'Sufficiently Decentralized'
articles.description: Brad Garlinghouse, Ripple CEO, speaks at Davos 2020. (CoinDesk)

articles.title: LUNC Eyes Over $1T Staked Ahead Of Terra Parity Finalization
articles.description: A whopping 14.6% of all LUNC tokens are staked, creating an unusual milestone for the embattled blockchain.

articles.title: SEC Emails Reveal: Hinman Wasn’t Only Official Deliberating ETH Security
articles.description: Recently released email exchanges from 2018 reveal that multiple U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) officials were in deliberation over Ethers status as a security. These emails were published by Ripple in itslegal battle with the SEC, which accuses Ripple of illegally selling XRP for more than seven years as unregistered securities.[caption id="attachment_124533" align="alignnone"...

articles.title: SEC officials pushed Hinman to clarify ETH wasn’t a security: Court docs
articles.description: Documents show that Hinman and other SEC officials planned to meet with Vitalik Buterin ahead of a 2018 speech

articles.title: Former SEC director Hinman’s plan to call Vitalik Buterin revealed in Ripple lawsuit
articles.description: Newly released documents show that William Hinman, a former director of the SEC's Division of Corporation Finance, planned to have a conversation with Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin in 2018.

articles.title: Gary Gensler hasn’t always believed everything but bitcoin is a security
articles.description: In a video filmed in 2018, Gensler claims that neither Bitcoin, Ether, Litecoin, or Bitcoin Cash should be regarded as securities.

articles.title: Cardano: Can you still ‘buy the dip’?
articles.description: While ADA's price recovered from the market heat of the past week, the token has been hit with selling pressure. But how soon will another chance present itself?

articles.title: Polygon unveils plan to build network of ZK-based Layer 2 chains
articles.description: Polygon 2.0 will provide a multi-chain network of ZK-powered Layer 2 chains that can securely interact with each other.

articles.title: Ripple CEO: Hinman docs are ‘well worth the wait’
articles.description: Brad Garlinghouse hinted that the eagerly awaited Hinman documents, which detail internal deliberations by Securities and Exchange Commission staff, could tip the court battle in Ripple’s favor.
